background.en: Java Backend Engineer specializing in enterprise systems, security integration, and high-concurrency backend architecture. Experienced in Spring Boot, Spring Security, Redis, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Kubernetes, OAuth2/Keycloak, and enterprise API gateway integration. Previously worked in banking, macro research, and fintech strategy before transitioning into enterprise software engineering.
background.zh: 專精企業系統、安全整合與高併發後端架構的 Java 後端工程師。具備 Spring Boot、Spring Security、Redis、PostgreSQL、RabbitMQ、Kubernetes、OAuth2/Keycloak 與企業 API 閘道整合等豐富經驗。轉型企業軟體工程前，曾任職於銀行業、總體研究與金融科技策略領域。

en: 2026/04 ~ Present - Enterprise Account Security & Validation: Diagnosed authentication/session, cookie persistence, CSRF/CORS, and request lifecycle issues across enterprise banking systems. Implemented AccountUsage/TWCT validation workflows, multilingual code-table integration, reconciliation logic, and Angular reactive-form validation flows. Built 14 Angular internal-account management screens and refactored middleware inserter workflows to improve maintainability and downstream integration consistency. Diagnosed request lifecycle issues across browser interceptors, backend filters, controller binding, and centralized exception handling flows.

2026/03 ~ Present - Enterprise Gateway Architecture Optimization: Refactored enterprise gateway architecture using centralized route registry, Adapter, and Facade patterns to reduce hardcoded route coupling and improve maintainability. Built custom request transformers and pagination aggregators for legacy backend integrations and downstream response normalization. Externalized environment-specific configuration management and removed hardcoded routing dependencies from gateway modules. Improved frontend/backend interoperability through reusable gateway abstraction and standardized request/response workflows.

2026/01 ~ Present - Thumbnail Asset Manager — High-Performance Media App: (I) Controller Pooling: Engineered VideoPlayerController pool to resolve hardware decoder contention and optimize memory usage. (II) Visual Effects: Developed seamless Boomerang (Forward+Reverse) loops via precise seek control. (III) Unified Caching: Built AssetCacheManager for persistent storage of both image and video assets. (IV) Asset Probing: Implemented VideoProber for background discovery and metadata extraction. — Responsibilities: Flutter architecture design, performance tuning, cache strategy, and visual effect implementation — Data Module: ThumbManager (Structure: Controller Pool / Asset Cache / Prober; Logic: Memory Management & Background Discovery)

2025/12 ~ 2026/03 - Printing Confirmation: Delivered Angular frontend and Java middleware-gateway enhancements across enterprise printing-confirmation workflows. Built reusable frontend strategies, validation handling flows, and XML/JSON gateway routing integrations. Refactored frontend architecture to reduce duplicated business logic and improve maintainability. Developed Flutter-based media application with controller pooling, memory optimization, and unified asset caching workflows.
zh: 2026/04 ~ Present - 企業帳戶安全與驗證：診斷企業銀行系統中的驗證/Session、Cookie 持久性、CSRF/CORS 及請求生命週期問題。實作 AccountUsage/TWCT 驗證工作流程、多語系碼表整合、對帳邏輯，以及 Angular reactive form 驗證流程。建置 14 個 Angular 內部帳戶管理畫面，並重構中介標頭注入工作流程以提升可維護性與下游整合一致性。診斷橫跨瀏覽器攔截器、後端過濾器、Controller binding 及集中式例外處理流程的請求生命週期問題。
2026/03 ~ Present - 企業閘道架構優化：以集中式路由註冊表、Adapter 與 Facade 模式重構企業閘道架構，降低硬編碼路由耦合並提升可維護性。為遺留後端整合建置自訂請求轉換器與分頁聚合器，並標準化下游回應。外部化環境參數配置管理，移除閘道模組中的硬編碼路由依賴。透過可重用閘道抽象與標準化請求/回應工作流程，改善前後端互通性。

2026/01 ~ Present - Thumbnail Asset Manager — 高性能媒體資產管理應用：(一) 資源池管理：實作 VideoPlayerController Pool 解決硬體解碼器競合並優化記憶體使用。(二) 視覺特效：以尋軌控制開發無縫 Boomerang (正序+倒序) 循環效果。(三) 統一快取：建立 AssetCacheManager 序列化管理圖片與影片的持久化快取。(四) 自動探測：實作 VideoProber 進行背景資產掃描與自動化發現。；主要負責：Flutter 核心架構設計、效能調優與資源池管理、視覺效果與快取策略實作；資料模組：ThumbManager（資料結構：Controller Pool / Asset Cache / Prober；操作邏輯：Memory Optimization & Async Probing；存取介面：Flutter UI + Local Cache）
2025/12 ~ 2026/03 - 列印確認書：交付橫跨企業列印確認工作流程的 Angular 前端與 Java 中介閘道強化。建置可重用前端策略、驗證處理流程，以及 XML/JSON 閘道路由整合。重構前端架構以減少重複業務邏輯並提升可維護性。開發具控制器池化、記憶體優化與統一資產快取工作流程的 Flutter 媒體應用程式。

en: 2025/04 ~ Present - Document Management System: Built Spring Boot backend with Redis Session, Spring Security, WebSocket, retry handling, and PostgreSQL optimization. Implemented REST APIs, ACL/versioning workflows, and real-time notification systems. Added JUnit5/Mockito testing and Grafana/Prometheus monitoring.

2025/01 ~ 2025/03 - External Portal & Website: Implemented Redis TTL caching, distributed locking, session fixation protection, and concurrency-control workflows. Tuned high-load endpoints through cache optimization and request-flow analysis. Built ordered global exception handling for enterprise backend APIs.

2024/08 ~ 2024/09 - DevOps Management Portal: Configured Spring Security, JWT, OAuth2 Resource Server, Keycloak/RedHat SSO, and RBAC authorization workflows. Designed secure authentication/session-management strategies for enterprise systems.

2024/06 ~ 2024/07 - Cloud Infrastructure & Kubernetes Deployment: Designed OCI infrastructure including VCN, OKE, subnets, bastion, and load balancers using Terraform. Automated infrastructure provisioning and Kubernetes deployment workflows.

2024/03 ~ 2024/05 - System Modernization & Deployment: Built JBoss WAR CI/CD pipelines supporting 10+ servers and containerized legacy applications. Upgraded Java applications from Java 8/11 to Java 17 and migrated 20+ RHEL servers.
zh: 2025/04 ~ Present - 文件管理系統：建置含 Redis Session、Spring Security、WebSocket、重試處理與 PostgreSQL 優化的 Spring Boot 後端。實作 REST API、ACL/版本控管工作流程與即時通知系統。導入 JUnit5/Mockito 測試與 Grafana/Prometheus 監控。
2025/01 ~ 2025/03 - 外部專區與入口網站：實作 Redis TTL 快取、分散式鎖、Session 固定攻擊防護與並發控制工作流程。透過快取優化與請求流程分析調校高負載端點。為企業後端 API 建置有序的全域例外處理機制。
2024/08 ~ 2024/09 - DevOps 管理後台：配置 Spring Security、JWT、OAuth2 Resource Server、Keycloak/RedHat SSO 與 RBAC 授權工作流程。設計企業系統的安全驗證與 Session 管理策略。
2024/06 ~ 2024/07 - 雲端基礎架構與 Kubernetes 部署：以 Terraform 設計 OCI 基礎架構，包含 VCN、OKE、子網路、Bastion 與負載平衡器。自動化基礎設施佈建與 Kubernetes 部署工作流程。
2024/03 ~ 2024/05 - 系統現代化與部署：建置支援 10+ 台伺服器的 JBoss WAR CI/CD Pipeline，並將遺留應用程式容器化。將 Java 應用程式從 Java 8/11 升級至 Java 17，並遷移 20+ 台 RHEL 伺服器。

en: 2024/10 ~ 2024/12 - Customer Portal Q&A Assistant (FastAPI + LangChain): Built FastAPI + LangChain RAG chatbot with PostgreSQL pg_trgm/pgvector hybrid retrieval pipelines using GIN and IVFFlat indexes. Designed multi-LLM fallback workflows, no-knowledge handling strategies, and conversational context retrieval pipelines. Implemented hybrid semantic/full-text retrieval workflows and prompt orchestration for enterprise-style knowledge systems. Developed chat-history persistence and retrieval logic for conversational AI applications.

2023/07 ~ 2023/09 - SmartSync Crawler (WordPress Plugin): Developed automated WordPress crawler plugin with secure admin controls and XPath-based product extraction workflows. Implemented timeout-resilient crawling, content normalization, UTF-8 CSV export, and structured content-generation pipelines. Built URL collection, data extraction, and content-processing workflows for automated product synchronization.

2023/03 ~ 2023/06 - Restaurant Booking & CMS Platform (Vue 3 + Spring Boot): Built Vue 3 + Spring Boot booking and CMS platform with JWT/RBAC authentication and business-management workflows. Developed reservation, menu, customer, branch, coupon, and order-management modules with RESTful API architecture. Delivered BI dashboards, analytics workflows, and Docker-based deployment environments.
zh: 2024/10 ~ 2024/12 - 客戶專區問答輔助系統（FastAPI + LangChain）：以 FastAPI + LangChain 建置 RAG 聊天機器人，搭配 PostgreSQL pg_trgm/pgvector 混合檢索管道（GIN/IVFFlat 索引）。設計多 LLM 回退工作流程、無知識處理策略與對話上下文檢索管道。實作混合語義/全文檢索工作流程與 Prompt 編排，適用於企業知識系統。開發對話式 AI 應用的聊天記錄持久化與檢索邏輯。
2023/07 ~ 2023/09 - SmartSync Crawler（WordPress 插件）：開發具安全管理介面與 XPath 產品提取工作流程的自動化 WordPress 爬蟲插件。實作具超時韌性的爬取、內容標準化、UTF-8 CSV 匯出與結構化內容生成管道。建置 URL 收集、資料提取與內容處理工作流程，以實現自動化產品同步。
2023/03 ~ 2023/06 - 餐廳訂位與管理平台（Vue 3 + Spring Boot）：以 Vue 3 + Spring Boot 建置訂位與 CMS 平台，整合 JWT/RBAC 驗證與業務管理工作流程。以 RESTful API 架構開發預約、菜單、客戶、分店、優惠券與訂單管理模組。交付 BI 儀表板、分析工作流程與 Docker 部署環境。

2022/11 ~ 2022/12 - Analyzed macroeconomic indicators including container shipping trends, US retail sales, TWD currency flows, foreign exchange dynamics, and EPFR fund flows for cross-asset allocation strategies, mapping market behavior patterns to investment decision frameworks

2022/10 ~ 2022/11 - Delivered daily market intelligence reports covering emerging markets (Mexico, India, Brazil) with real-time analysis, utilized scikit-learn, statsmodels and scipy for data analysis and statistical modeling, structuring complex market data into actionable insights through systematic data flow analysis

2022/09 ~ 2022/10 - Built automated reporting workflows; integrated SinoPac Shioaji trading API for market data ingestion and strategy prototyping, designing real-time market analysis data processing pipelines; utilized pandas, numpy and scipy for futures price and implied volatility data analysis, implementing automated backtesting frameworks and quantitative trading strategies (Red K strategy, volatility-based dynamic rebalancing strategy)
zh: 2022/12 ~ 2023/01 - 維護並強化橫跨 10+ 個資料庫的數據基礎設施，以支援全面的市場分析，優化多源金融數據整合的數據流程架構
2022/11 ~ 2022/12 - 分析宏觀經濟指標，包括貨櫃航運趨勢、美國零售銷售、台幣資金流向、外匯動態與 EPFR 基金流向，以制定跨資產配置策略，將市場行為模式對應至投資決策框架
2022/10 ~ 2022/11 - 每日提供涵蓋新興市場（墨西哥、印度、巴西）的市場情報報告，並進行即時分析，運用 scikit-learn、statsmodels 與 scipy 進行數據分析與統計建模，透過系統化數據流程分析將複雜市場數據結構化為可執行洞察
2022/09 ~ 2022/10 - 建置自動化報表工作流程；整合永豐金 Shioaji API 進行市場數據攝取與策略原型開發，設計即時市場分析的數據處理管道；運用 pandas、numpy 與 scipy 進行期貨價格與隱含波動率數據分析，實作自動化回測框架與量化交易策略（紅K策略、基於隱含波動率動態切換的再平衡策略）

2022/02 ~ 2022/03 - Managed 31 operational procedures for the digital payment department ensuring compliance and efficiency, designing workflow logic and data validation processes; implemented open-source RPA solutions using Python with Selenium for process automation and workflow optimization

2021/12 ~ 2022/01 - 進行 BNPL、加密貨幣與線上小額信貸產品設計等新興金融科技趨勢研究，並每週提交報告，將產品功能對應至用戶行為模式
2021/10 ~ 2021/11 - 撰寫 20+ 份商業計畫書，並與大型電信公司合作成功提出 2 個數位支付專案，分析用戶旅程流程與支付處理邏輯

personality.en:
Results-driven and pragmatic, KTY approaches every problem through the lens of feasibility, efficiency, and deliverability — prioritizing actionable output over theoretical exploration.

Rationally analytical at the core, he relies on logic and structured thinking to navigate complex or high-pressure situations. His decision-making consistently returns to the fundamentals: what is the nature of this problem, and what do the rules and logic dictate? This stable, affect-neutral approach consistently improves problem-solving quality.

Strong systems thinker who naturally decomposes complexity into manageable modules, analyzing systems through architecture, data flow, and component relationships. He habitually evaluates trade-offs via A/B comparison and proactively identifies bottlenecks — in performance, concurrency, or resource usage — to drive continuous optimization.

In short: a logic- and data-driven engineering mindset that pairs execution speed with optimization discipline, capable of rapidly pinpointing root causes and shipping grounded solutions even under shifting requirements.
personality.zh:
具備強烈的結果導向思維，習慣從「是否可行、是否有效率、是否能落地」的角度切入問題，重視實際產出與執行成效。在面對需求或技術挑戰時，優先考量解決方案的可實作性與執行效率，能快速做出判斷並推進落地，而非僅停留於理論層面。

個性偏理性分析，處理問題時以邏輯與結構化思考為核心。即使在壓力或複雜情境下，仍會回歸「問題本質為何」、「規則與邏輯是什麼」來進行判斷，具備穩定且一致的決策模式，能有效降低情緒干擾，提升問題解決品質。

同時具備良好的系統性思維，擅長將複雜問題拆解為可管理的模組，並從系統架構、流程與元件關係進行分析。習慣透過不同方案比較（A/B）來評估優劣，並主動找出系統瓶頸（如效能、併發、資源使用）進行優化，使整體系統在穩定性與效率上持續提升。

整體而言，屬於以邏輯與數據驅動的工程型人格，兼具執行力與優化能力，能在變動需求中快速定位問題並提出可落地的解決方案，同時持續進行系統性改善。

expertise.en: Core backend expertise in Spring Boot layered architecture, PostgreSQL/Redis performance tuning, and RabbitMQ async processing. Proficient in enterprise security with Keycloak/JWT/OAuth2, and DevOps workflows spanning Jenkins, Docker, and Kubernetes on OCI/OpenShift. Hands-on experience building AI retrieval systems with LangChain RAG and pgvector hybrid search. Additional frontend exposure in Angular and Flutter.
expertise.zh: 後端核心：Spring Boot 多層架構、PostgreSQL/Redis 效能優化、RabbitMQ 非同步處理；安全：Keycloak/JWT/OAuth2；DevOps：Jenkins/Docker/K8s/OCI/OpenShift；AI：LangChain RAG 與 pgvector 混合檢索；兼具 Angular、Flutter 前端整合經驗。
